Off Calendar Jul-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Petition to Reduce Required Voting Percentage (Civil Code 4275) is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
